summary: A second-hand marketplace app for Harry Potter and wizarding world items where users can buy and sell magical collectibles
architectural_notes: Image upload capability needed for item listings

existing_features.title: Create user authentication system using Internet Identity for buyers and sellers to securely log in
Implement item listing creation system where sellers can add Harry Potter and wizarding world items with title, description, price, condition, and category
Build marketplace browse and search interface displaying all available Harry Potter and wizarding items with filtering by category, price range, and condition
Create shopping cart system where buyers can add multiple items, view cart contents, adjust quantities, and proceed to checkout
Implement messaging system allowing buyers and sellers to communicate about listings, ask questions, and coordinate transactions

Design a magical, wizarding-themed visual style with enchanted aesthetics including mystical colors (deep purples, emerald greens, gold accents), parchment-inspired textures, and elegant typography that evokes the Harry Potter universe throughout the entire application
Display generated marketplace hero banner, wizarding shop icon, and category placeholder images as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated
Create a user profile page component that displays a seller's information including their name, email (if provided), seller status, and member since date
Display all active listings created by the profile owner on their profile page in a grid layout similar to the browse page
Add navigation links to seller profiles from item cards and item detail pages by making the seller name clickable
Create a React Query hook for fetching user profile data with their listings and integrate it into the profile page component
Add a 'View Profile' link or button in the Layout header navigation when user is authenticated that navigates to their own profile page

new_feature_requests.summary: Item listing creation with photos, descriptions, and pricing
Browse and search marketplace for Harry Potter/wizarding items
Messaging system between buyers and sellers
User profile pages where sellers can showcase their collections
Add backend query function to retrieve a user's public profile information by principal ID including their profile data and all their active listings
